perimeter_name.description: Specifies the name of the service perimeter to associate the resource with; must be an existing perimeter.

resource.description: Specifies the GCP resource to be included in the service perimeter. Must be in the format `projects/{project_number}` or `projects/{project_id}`.

timeouts.description: Manages the timeouts for creating, updating, or deleting the service perimeter resource.
